programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers from the invention test now compete for a chance at immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Team Challenge: Identical Plates
programme.desc: Each pair must make identical plates but they will not be able to see or taste what their teammate is cooking.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The bottom four contestants from the team challenge now must cook-off.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: This program is about to get even bigger as the competition travels to the land of the cherry blossom, Japan.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Kappo-style Degustation Menu
programme.desc: Each of the eight contestants will be part of an 8-course Kappo-style degustation.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The winning contestants have a chance to fight it out for immunity in view of Mount Fuji at a tea plantation.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Off-site Challenge: Shinjuku
programme.desc: Contestants will be cooking at a local alleyway packed with street stalls to feed hundreds of hungry diners.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Contestants must cook a dish that celebrates where they have come from and where they are going.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Masterclass: Odaka Takayuki, George Calombaris, Matt Preston and Kagehisa Imada
programme.desc: On the last day in Japan, the judges and local chefs give the contestants a MasterClass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: Contestants have an hour to create a dish from mystery ingredients to gain an advantage in the invention test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Kylie Millar
programme.desc: The three least impressive contestants from the invention test cook-off.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best invention test performers now face a special souffle immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Service Challenge: 50 Hungry Customers
programme.desc: The judges reveal that each contestant will be in charge of a dish to serve 50 hungry customers.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The three least impressive contestants from the service challenge must cook to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: It's finals week. The top six contestants enter the kitchen to face a mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Shaun Quade's Pearl on the Ocean Floor
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test now cook off in a pressure test to avoid elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The top five contestants must create either a sweet or savoury dish and present seven plates of food.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Service Challenge: Dinner by Heston
programme.desc: The top four contestants enter one of Melbourne's top restaurants, Dinner By Heston, for a service challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge & MasterClass 5
programme.desc: Three contestants must create a dish worthy of a place in the semifinal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Semi Final
programme.desc: The stakes are high as the three remaining contestants fight it out for the two places in the finale.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Grand Finale
programme.desc: Who will be crowned the winner of 2017? The finalists are competing for a $250,000 cash prize.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - EP964
programme.desc: The Winners are Announced for MasterChef Australia Season 9!

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP14
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - It Takes Two
programme.desc: Mother, teacher, and former marine Jade Thomas is all about family.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Southern Charm
programme.desc: Witness an ultimate television cliffhanger as Robert Evans fills the stage with southern charm.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Ice Cream Dreams
programme.desc: Entrepreneur, Ally Teixeira has sweet dreams that will change the face of the ice cream industry forever.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Flying High
programme.desc: Poker player Shireen Mui goes all in against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Small Town, Big Dreams
programme.desc: Loveable Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town, Marble Falls, TX.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - My Big Fat Greek Game Show
programme.desc: George Stathoulis and his big Greek family take over the show in a plate-breaking and suspense filled game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: The Motor City, Detroit, brings one-of-a-kind father of five sons, John West, to the stage.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Philadelphia’s Missy Silverman shakes up the stage with her boundless energy.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Sony's Choice
programme.desc: One of Deal or No Deal’s biggest fans, Sony Avalos is clear she knows how to play the game better than anyone.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Cowboy Up
programme.desc: Real life Las Vegas hero, Justin Uhart storms the stage ready to risk it all for his chance at $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP83
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP31
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP27
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP28
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP29
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Cheering For A Lucky Strike
programme.desc: Cheerleader Tex Iniguez shakes her pom poms past six figures in hopes of beating The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Lane
programme.desc: Double the deals, double the drama - bowling champion Kyera presses on in her battle against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Mile-High Millionaire
programme.desc: Flight attendant, Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Bingo To A Million
programme.desc: Playing for his Golden Girls-style dream home, former Bingo caller Tony Oriente.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Musical
programme.desc: Business owner, La’Sherrie Butler Hogan showstops the stage, and the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Musical
programme.desc: Business owner, La’Sherrie Butler Hogan showstops the stage, and the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Ironman
programme.desc: Miami police officer and Ironman competitor Jorge Montero seeks to secure his children's future.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Monopoly Money
programme.desc: Real estate agent, Toni Miller is used to buying and selling hot properties.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - The Champ Vs. The Banker
programme.desc: Michael Chandler is used to taking some hits and putting up a good fight – and tonight is no different.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Single mother and marathoner Monica Durazo comes from a sales background and a family of competitors.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP28
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (28 out of 39)

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (11 out of 39)

(25 out of 39)

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Auditions
programme.desc: The hit local cooking competition is back, bigger and better than ever before.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Whole Chicken
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants face a sudden death challenge to find who will go through to the Top 16.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Loaf
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef mansion on Auckland's North Shore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Takeaways
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must cook three classic takeaway dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - The Navy
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants make canapés for 130 guests on board the HMNZS Canterbury.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Moo Chow Chow
programme.desc: The Top 13 face their spiciest challenge yet: to cook two dishes for guest chef Che Barrington.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - La Cigale
programme.desc: A Mystery Box Challenge has the cooks baking from the heart.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #1
programme.desc: MasterClass turns the tables and puts the MasterChef judges in the spotlight.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Frozen, Canned & Packaged
programme.desc: The remaining cooks compete in teams for a gourmet sausage challenge in celebration of Oktoberfest.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #2
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh, Simon and Ray cook three simple but tasty dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Hawkes Bay
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants travel to Hawkes Bay for an invention test using spring lamb and fresh local produce.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #3
programme.desc: MasterClass turns the tables and puts the MasterChef judges in the spotlight.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Super Cake
programme.desc: The Top Eight contestants make a hamburger cake and a milkshake for baking maestro Mathew Metcalfe

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #4
programme.desc: Guest chef Mathew Metcalfe joins Josh Emett and Ray McVinnie to make three delectable desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Young Guns
programme.desc: The top seven contestants cook fine dining dishes for three guest chefs.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #5
programme.desc: Guest chef Nick Honeyman cooks three very different examples of modern New Zealand cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Huka Lodge
programme.desc: The top six contestants cook a course each from the gourmet dinner menu at iconic Huka Lodge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #6
programme.desc: Guest chef Michel Louws from Huka Lodge joins Josh Emett and Simon Gault to cook three hearty meat dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Super Dessert
programme.desc: The top five contestants must replicate a challenging dessert created by award-winning chef, Michael Meredith.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #7
programme.desc: Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook their favourite desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Business Class
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants cook Business Class in-flight meals for Jetstar.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #8
programme.desc: Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook three different cuts of beef.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Singapore
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants face two epic challenges in the culinary capital of Asia, Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #9
programme.desc: Street food master K.F. Seetoh and Eric Bost, join Ray McVinnie for a Masterclass in Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Cookbook
programme.desc: The three semi-finalists try to impress cookbook queen Annabel Langbein.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #10
programme.desc: In the last Masterclass of the Season, the judge give us a taster of their signature dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - The Final
programme.desc: The final two contestants take on four challenges in their bid to become New Zealand's next MasterChef.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP37
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (37 out of 39)

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game.
